category_sources: Official Unidata documentation describes netCDF as libraries and self-describing formats for array-oriented scientific data.
source_facts.description: Libraries and data formats for array-oriented scientific data.
display_name_sources: Official Unidata project pages use the stylized display name netCDF.
docs_sources: Official Unidata NetCDF-C documentation is hosted at docs.unidata.ucar.edu/netcdf-c/current/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/Unidata/netcdf-c; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description: Libraries and data formats for array-oriented scientific data.
source_facts.executables includes nc-config, ncdump, ncgen, and ncgen3 utilities.
